modifiers.add.heading: Add Modifier
modifiers.edit.heading: Edit Modifier
modifiers.running_totals_note: These are running totals; edit them for imports or corrections. Accuracy is not guaranteed.
modifiers.recalculate.heading: Recalculate: {name}
modifiers.recalculate.choose: Choose at least one total to recalculate
modifiers.adjust_revenue_warning: This posts a correcting entry to the money ledger — the source of truth for revenue. Corrections are appended, never destructive: the difference from the current figure is recorded as a write-off adjustment.
modifiers.delete.heading: Delete Modifier
modifiers.delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the modifier {name}?
modifiers.delete.confirm_prompt: Type the modifier name to confirm:
modifiers.err_child_only_addon: '{name}' is an opt-in add-on reachable only through a required child listing, so no booking page would offer it — scope it to the parent (or another bookable listing), or remove it as a child, before saving.
modifiers.answers.heading: Linked answers
modifiers.answers.hint: This modifier applies when a buyer selects any of the ticked answers.
modifiers.answers.none: No question answers to link yet.
modifiers.recalculate.description: Compare the stored modifier totals with totals counted from attendee records. Select only the stored values you want to replace.
